Off Calendar Mar-17-2026 Continued To Jun-03-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-19-2025 Off Calendar

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - PLAINTIFF WOUTER WITVOET MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Plaintiff Wouter Witvoet's unopposed Motion to Admit Pro Hac Vice Counsel Douglas Stephens, IV is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, counsel Douglas Stephens, IV may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Party in this action.

Moving Party must prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - PLAINTIFF WOUTER WITVOET MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Plaintiff Wouter Witvoet's unopposed Motion to Admit Pro Hac Vice Counsel Eric S. Rosen is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

An application to appear as counsel pro hac vice "must state[t]he title of each court and cause in which the applicant has filed an application to appear as counsel pro hac vice in this state in the preceding two years, the date of each application, and whether or not it was granted." (California Rules of Court, rule 9.40(d)(5).) The instant application contains none of this information. It is, therefore, denied without prejudice.

Moving Party must prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
